title: DSIT cyber security newsletter - June 2025
body: "The monthly Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) cyber security newsletter details the latest announcements, events and projects for people interested in the field of cyber security. This month’s edition includes:   PM launches Tech First scheme to train one million young people New plans and funding to supercharge UK cyber sector New code of practice to improve software security Respond to the call for views on enterprise connected device security Call for new Cyber Advisors.   You can sign up to receive the newsletter each month directly via email.  To ensure you receive the newsletter in your inbox please mark cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk as one of your contacts.  If you have any questions please email cybersecurity@dsit.gov.uk.  Further editions of the newsletter can be found on the cyber security newsletter collection page.  "
